description: The Random Point On Cone node returns a random point on the shell of a cone with the given ``Height`` and ``BaseRadius`` centered at ``[0; 0; 0]``.

fields.BaseRadius: The radius of the circle base of the cone.
fields.* ([[Type:float3|float3]]): A random point on the surface of the specified cone. The center of the cone is at ``[0; 0; 0]``, making the ``y`` field anywhere between ``-BaseHeight/2`` and ``+BaseHeight/2``, where the former is the circle side and the latter is the tip side.
